name: Hotel Assistant Tool - Search Available Rooms

parameters.jsCode:
const apiBaseUrl = 'http://host.docker.internal:3000/api/v1'
const from = $json.from ?? $json.date
const to = $json.to ?? $json.from ?? $json.date
const roomTypeCandidate = $json.roomTypeId ?? $json.roomType
const parsedRoomTypeId = Number(roomTypeCandidate)
const roomTypeId = Number.isInteger(parsedRoomTypeId) ? parsedRoomTypeId : undefined
return [{ json: { ...$json, from, to, periodFrom: from, periodTo: to, roomTypeId, apiBaseUrl, internalToken: 'dev-internal-token', limit: $json.limit ?? 50 } }]
